message:
shared: Add openai/ prefix to Codex models and pretty format GPT-Codex

- Standardize Codex model names with openai/ prefix during conversion
- Extend getModelDisplayName to format gpt-X.Y-codex as GPT-X.Y-Codex
- Update pricing resolver to strip prefixes for LiteLLM table lookup

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/dufsyrvtsb81dcocoqci7n0p
